# Proud Physio & Wellness

> Proud Physio & Wellness is a physiotherapy and rehabilitation clinic in Kakkanad, Kochi (Kerala, India). We provide expert, personalised, evidence-based physiotherapy for patients of all ages, at the clinic, in your home, or online by video consultation.

## About

Proud Physio & Wellness helps people recover from injuries, manage chronic conditions, improve mobility, and enhance overall wellbeing. Our mission is to empower individuals to take control of their physical health through expert physiotherapy, education, and continuous support. Care is delivered by certified, experienced physiotherapists and tailored to each patient's needs and goals.

- **Location:** SRA 26-C, Crash Rd, Vazhakkala, Kakkanad, Kochi, Kerala 682021, India
- **Phone:** +91 80894 14419
- **Email:** proudphysio1@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Every day, 08:00 AM to 10:00 PM
- **Website:** https://proudphysio.com/
- **Service area:** Kakkanad, Kochi, Ernakulam and surrounding areas (in-clinic and home-care)

## Services

Each service has a dedicated page with details, conditions treated and FAQs:

- [Home Care Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/home-care-physiotherapy/), specialised physiotherapy delivered at the patient's home for those unable to travel, across Kakkanad, Kochi and Ernakulam.
- [Musculoskeletal & Sports Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/musculoskeletal-sports-physiotherapy/), treatment of back and neck pain, joint, muscle and ligament injuries through targeted exercise, manual therapy and education.
- [Neurological Rehabilitation](https://proudphysio.com/services/neurological-rehabilitation/), care for stroke, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease and other neurological conditions.
- [Paediatric Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/paediatric-physiotherapy/), compassionate, play-based, child-focused care across a wide range of conditions including developmental delay and cerebral palsy.
- [Geriatric Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/geriatric-physiotherapy/), improving mobility, balance, fall prevention and independence for older adults.
- [Women's Health Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/womens-health-physiotherapy/), pelvic floor dysfunction, prenatal and postnatal support from a female physiotherapist.
- [Post-Surgical Rehabilitation](https://proudphysio.com/services/post-surgical-rehabilitation/), rebuilding strength, balance and confidence in movement after knee/hip replacement, ACL and other surgeries.
- [Ergonomic, Nutrition & Lifestyle Guidance](https://proudphysio.com/services/ergonomic-nutrition-lifestyle-guidance/), workstation ergonomics, posture and lifestyle strategies to support overall physical and mental performance.
- [Recurrence Management](https://proudphysio.com/services/recurrence-management/), identifying root causes of recurring pain and preventing future injury.
- [Online Physiotherapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/online-physiotherapy/), expert assessment and guided exercise therapy over video call, for follow-ups, busy professionals and patients away from Kochi (including NRIs).
- [Myofascial & Active Release Therapy](https://proudphysio.com/services/myofascial-release-therapy/), hands-on soft-tissue techniques that release tight fascia, trigger points and muscle knots.
- [Taping & Cupping](https://proudphysio.com/services/taping-cupping/), kinesiology taping to support injured joints and cupping therapy to release tight muscles and improve circulation.
- [Posture Correction](https://proudphysio.com/services/posture-correction/), assessment and correction of tech neck, rounded shoulders and desk-related posture problems.
- [Dry Needling](https://proudphysio.com/services/dry-needling/), fine sterile needles into muscle trigger points to relieve pain and restore movement, performed by a trained physiotherapist.

## Conditions We Treat

Each condition has a dedicated page explaining the condition and how our physiotherapy helps. Full list at [Conditions We Treat](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/).

- Neurological: [Stroke](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/stroke/), [Parkinson's Disease](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/parkinsons-disease/), [Spinal Cord Injury](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/spinal-cord-injury/), [Neuropathy](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/neuropathy/), [Hemiparesis](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/hemiparesis/).
- Orthopedic: [Back Pain](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/back-pain/), [Neck Pain](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/neck-pain/), [Knee Pain](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/knee-pain/), [Ankle Sprain](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/ankle-sprain/), [Tennis Elbow](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/tennis-elbow/), [Sports Injuries](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/sports-injuries/).
- Paediatric: [Developmental Delay](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/developmental-delay/), [Cerebral Palsy](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/cerebral-palsy/), [Muscular Dystrophy](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/muscular-dystrophy/), [Down Syndrome](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/down-syndrome/), [Autism](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/autism/).
- Women's Health: [PCOS](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/pcos/), [Diastasis Recti](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/diastasis-recti/), [Antenatal & Postnatal](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/antenatal-postnatal/), [Pelvic Floor Dysfunction](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/pelvic-floor-dysfunction/).

## Team

- **Dr. Noora Ameen TA (PT)** is the founder and lead physiotherapist at Proud Physio & Wellness. She has years of clinical experience across Kakkanad and Kochi, treating sports injuries, post-surgical recovery, neurological conditions, women's health and providing home care physiotherapy. Her approach is personal, evidence-based and focused on each patient's goals and daily life.

## Why Choose Us

- Personalised, evidence-based treatment plans for every patient
- Certified and experienced physiotherapists
- Flexible home-care physiotherapy across Kochi and Kakkanad
- Focus on both recovery and long-term injury prevention
- Warm, friendly and supportive clinical environment

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://proudphysio.com/): Overview of clinic, services, interactive symptom checker, testimonials and FAQs.
- [About Us](https://proudphysio.com/about/): Full story, mission statement, healing process, why patients choose us, and Dr. Noora's biography.
- [Services](https://proudphysio.com/#services): Full list of physiotherapy services offered, each linking to a detailed service page.
- [Conditions We Treat](https://proudphysio.com/conditions/): Neurological, orthopedic, paediatric and women's health conditions, each with a dedicated page on how physiotherapy helps.
- [Check Your Pain](https://proudphysio.com/#check): Interactive body map connecting symptoms to conditions and treatments.
- [FAQ](https://proudphysio.com/#faq): Answers to common questions about physiotherapy, recovery, home care and appointments.
- [Visit Us](https://proudphysio.com/#visit): Location, map and clinic hours.
- [Blog](https://proudphysio.com/blog/): All physiotherapy tips and insights.

## Contact

To book an appointment, call +91 80894 14419, email proudphysio1@gmail.com, or visit https://proudphysio.com/. No doctor's referral is required.
